description: This is a logo for "Land Monitoring", presented on a white background. The logo features a graphic element to the left and text to the right, both rendered in a light green colour. The graphic element on the left consists of a stylized representation of a city skyline or bar graph within an incomplete circular arc. Adjacent to it on the right is a stylized symbol of a wheat ear or crop. To the right of these graphic elements, the words "Land Monitoring" are stacked vertically, with "Land" above "Monitoring".
